name: A-138b
description: 4-channel logarithmic mixer with per-channel attenuators and a master output attenuator. Log taper on pots tracks perceived loudness, favouring audio summing over CV. A-138a is the linear sibling; otherwise panel-identical.

controls.name: Out
controls.description: Output level attenuator — also log taper. Lets the mixer sit at the end of the audio chain feeding a desk or amp directly.

inputs.name: Input 1
inputs.description: Audio input 1. Post-2004 units include a jumper (JP4) that turns Ch 1 into a ±0–5V DC offset generator when Input 1 is unpatched.

outputs.name: Output
outputs.description: Summed and master-attenuated mix of all four channels.

behaviors.name: Perceptual audio summing
behaviors.description: Log taper makes channel faders behave like a mixing desk: small rotations near the top produce subtle level changes, bottom of travel fades smoothly to silence. Preferred over A-138a for summing VCOs, drum voices, or VCA outputs.

behaviors.name: Master fader / interface to desk
behaviors.description: The master Out attenuator is unusual for A-100 and lets A-138b function as the final stage of a patch. Pull it back to mute the whole patch without touching source modules.

behaviors.name: Not ideal for precise CV summing
behaviors.description: Log taper distorts linear CV relationships — a pitch offset mixed here will not sum in volts as the knob reads. Use A-138a (linear) for CV-accurate summing.

behaviors.name: Unpatched Ch 1 as DC offset
behaviors.trigger: JP4 jumper installed · no cable in Input 1
behaviors.description: On units from mid-2004, JP4 in right position converts Ch 1 into a ~0 to +5V offset source; left position gives ~0 to −5V. Cable insertion in Input 1 disables the offset and restores audio.

patchIdeas.name: 3-VCO voice summing
patchIdeas.patch: Three VCOs → In 1–3 · blend saw/square/sub · Output → VCF
patchIdeas.diagram:
A-138b:
* In 1: 7 · In 2: 5 · In 3: 3 · Out: 8
- VCO 1 (Saw) -> A-138b (Input 1)
- VCO 2 (Sqr) -> A-138b (Input 2)
- Sub Osc (Sine) -> A-138b (Input 3)
- A-138b (Output) -> VCF (In)

patchIdeas.name: Drum bus
patchIdeas.patch: Kick/snare/hat/perc VCAs → In 1–4 · master Out → desk
patchIdeas.diagram:
A-138b:
* In 1: 9 · In 2: 7 · In 3: 6 · In 4: 5 · Out: 7
- Kick VCA (Out) -> A-138b (Input 1)
- Snare VCA (Out) -> A-138b (Input 2)
- Hat VCA (Out) -> A-138b (Input 3)
- Perc VCA (Out) -> A-138b (Input 4)
- A-138b (Output) -> Mixer (Line In)

patchIdeas.name: Final stage with master fade-out
patchIdeas.patch: Patch output → In 1 · ride the Out knob for crescendo/cut
patchIdeas.diagram:
A-138b:
* Out: manual
- Patch (Audio) -> A-138b (Input 1)
- A-138b (Output) -> Amp (In) // Out knob as performance fader

patchIdeas.name: FX blend
patchIdeas.patch: Dry to In 1 · reverb return to In 2 · delay return to In 3 · Out to mains
patchIdeas.diagram:
A-138b:
* In 1: 8 · In 2: 4 · In 3: 5 · Out: 7
- Dry (Audio) -> A-138b (Input 1)
- Reverb (Out) -> A-138b (Input 2)
- Delay (Out) -> A-138b (Input 3)
- A-138b (Output) -> Mixer (L)
